subject: Performance Warning — Return Rate Exceeded
description: Your return rate has exceeded 25% for the past 30 days. Immediate corrective action required. Account may face listing suppression within 7 days if not resolved.
recommended_actions: Add size charts to apparel listings

subject: LST030 — Counterfeit Product Suspicion
description: Listing LST030 'Counterfeit iPhone Charger 20W' has been flagged as potentially selling counterfeit Apple branded products. Selling counterfeit items violates Section 4.1 of Seller Policy. Listing has been temporarily suppressed pending investigation.

subject: Payout Dispute — PAY-2024-005
description: Seller disputes 50% deduction rate applied in payout PAY-2024-005. Expected net amount was ₹6,460 but received only ₹3,800. Penalty of ₹3,200 appears incorrectly applied. Settlement team reviewing.

subject: Appeal — Account Suspension Risk Warning
description: Account has received final warning before suspension. Seller rating at 3.2 (below 3.5 threshold) and return rate at 41% (above 25% threshold). Seller has submitted appeal with corrective action plan.
seller_submitted_plan: We have identified root causes: missing size charts on clothing listings, poor quality in LST002/LST012. Immediate actions: (1) Added size charts to all apparel. (2) Removed defective product batches. (3) Implemented incoming QC check. (4) Updated all product descriptions. Requesting 30 days to demonstrate improvement.

subject: LST006 — Price Above MRP Violation
description: Listing LST006 was suppressed because selling price ₹1,599 exceeds MRP ₹999. This violates Amazon India pricing policy. Seller must correct MRP or reduce selling price.
resolution: Seller updated MRP to ₹1,799. Listing reinstated after verification.
recommended_actions: Verify MRP on all electronics listings

subject: Disputed Returns — CUST-1040 Repeat Abuse
description: Customer CUST-1040 has initiated 8 returns in 3 months totaling ₹7,800. Pattern analysis shows potential return abuse. Seller has disputed 5 of these returns as buyer-responsible.
recommended_actions: Submit photographic evidence for each disputed return

subject: Inventory Count Mismatch — LST001
description: System inventory shows 142 units for LST001 but seller physical count shows 89 units. Discrepancy of 53 units. Investigation found 53 units were allocated for pending orders but not deducted.
resolution: Inventory synced correctly. 53 units allocated to pending orders have been excluded from available stock.
recommended_actions: Set up low stock alerts at 20 units

subject: GST Mismatch — December Settlements
description: GST calculation in payout PAY-2024-007 does not match GSTIN records. System applied 18% GST on fashion items which are taxable at 5%. Excess GST of ₹1,250 has been deducted incorrectly.
recommended_actions: Provide product HSN codes for affected items
Request GST correction from accounts team

subject: Keyword Stuffing Violation — LST013
description: Listing LST013 title contains repeated keywords and exceeds acceptable keyword density. Title must be meaningful and not exceed 150 characters. Listing was flagged for keyword stuffing.
resolution: Seller updated title to 'Men's Ethnic Printed Cotton Kurta — Festive Casual Wear'. Listing reinstated.
recommended_actions: Review all listing titles for keyword stuffing

subject: Critical Alert — Restricted Product Listing (LST016)
description: LST016 'Ayurvedic Weight Loss Capsules' makes unverified health claims including 'guaranteed weight loss in 7 days'. Such claims require CDSCO approval. Seller must provide certification or remove listing within 48 hours.
recommended_actions: Obtain CDSCO certification for health products
Revise description to factual statements only
